titleStmt.title: SII 40.365: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 365. (A.R. No. 177 of 1934.) Chauḍēpalli, Punganur Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Lingāyata-maṭha.
This is dated Śaka 1670, Śukla, Jyēshṭha, śu. 5.

Records a gift of land by Immaḍi Chikarāya Tammaya Gaunayya, son of Mummaḍi Chikkarāya Tammaya Gaunayya and grandson of Immaḍi Chikarāya Tammaya Gaunigāru of Suguṭūru, for the maintenance of a new well and a maṭha built by Beṇṇaṁgūri Channamma. The maṭha entrusted to a certain Basavappadēva who was a follower of the Allamaprabhusvāmi saṁ pradāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1670 A
gunayaḍi śukla nāma saṁvvatsara jēṣṭha
śu 5 lu Allamā prabhusvāmula
sāṁpradāyakulayina basavappadēvaravāri
ki sadāśivagotraṁ suguṭūru yiṁmmaḍi ci
karāya taṁmmayagavunigāri pautṛlaina mu
ṁmmaḍi cikkarāya taṁmmayagaunayyagāri pu
tṛlaina yiṁmmaḍi cikkarāya taṁmmayagānayya
gāru vrāyiṁcci yiccina bhūdāna dharmaśāsa
naṁ māyelubaḍiki celle cavuḍepalle staḷāna be
ṁṇṇaṁgūru caṁnnaṁmma nūtanamugā bhāviṁnni ma
ṭhamu kaṭṭiṁcci Āmaṭhaṁ mīku śaraṇucēśi Aṁduku
svānviṁdaya ceyiṁccavalenani manavi cāyagā
cavuḍipalle staḷaṁ vaḷavaina reṇimākulapalle polā
na cenu kha 3 mūḍupuṭlu Āmani guṁṭaceruvu
kiṁdu maḍi kha 3 mūḍupuṭlu yī prakāraṁ nirna
yaṁ ceśi maṭhānaku śaraṇu cēśināraṁ ganaka yī
svāsyaṁ mī putrapautrapāraṁparyamugā Anu
bhaviṁccu koni dharmaṁmaṁmuna cercukoni su
khānanuṁḍamani vrāyiṁcci yiccina bhūdā
nadharmmaśāsanadānapatraṁ
Digital edition of SII 40.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
